courseTitle: Game Systems, Loops, and Player Experience
title: Dynamic Difficulty Game
genericDescription: Adapt challenge to player performance; measure player state without being intrusive; preserve dignity and agency when assistance is provided.
specificDescription: Build a game that tracks at least two performance signals and modifies challenge during play. Include a debug overlay or post-game report showing what adapted and why.
gradingRubric: 30 pts adaptive design logic; 20 pts fairness and transparency; 20 pts implementation reliability; 15 pts player report/debug explanation; 15 pts reflection.
